visual_description: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair, wearing a dark pinstripe blazer over a white collared shirt, sits beside a man with dark hair and a beard, dressed in a gray striped sweater; both are seated at a table in a crowded cafeteria or dining area. The woman looks down at her hands, then up and gestures with her hands while speaking, while the man holds a napkin or small item in his hands and looks toward her. Other people are visible in the background, seated and engaged in their own activities, with the focus remaining on the two individuals at the table.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, while a female voice is also present, both speaking in English.
